content.text: Now let me create all 5 files.

data.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi

content.text: All 5 files are created. Now let me verify the dev server starts without errors.

input.command:
cd /c/Users/User/RoyallAzz && pnpm dev 2>&1 &
DEV_PID=$!
sleep 15
# Check if the process is still running (meaning it didn't crash)
if kill -0 $DEV_PID 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "=== DEV SERVER IS RUNNING ==="
  # Try to fetch the page
  curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP Status: %{http_code}\n" http://localhost:3000 2>/dev/null || echo "curl not available, but server is running"
  kill $DEV_PID 2>/dev/null
  wait $DEV_PID 2>/dev/null
else
  echo "=== DEV SERVER CRASHED ==="
  wait $DEV_PID 2>/dev/null
fi
input.description: Start dev server and verify it runs without errors

content.text:
---

## Report: Tasks 3-4 Complete

### What was implemented

**Task 3 -- Design System (`globals.css`):**
- Full CitedBy.io-based dual-theme design system with TailwindCSS v4 (`@import "tailwindcss"`)
- Light mode (default): Frase.io-style warm neutrals with emerald accent (#059669)
- Dark mode (`.dark` class): Linear/Vercel-style zinc palette with brighter emerald (#10B981)
- CSS custom properties for: backgrounds, borders, text, accents, status colors, glassmorphism
- Foundation styles: font stacks (Geist Sans/Mono), antialiasing, selection color
- Custom scrollbar styling (thin, themed)
- Focus-visible outlines with accent color
- Animations: fadeInUp, shimmer skeleton, fade-in, zoom-in, slide-in, stagger delays
- Micro-interactions: hover-lift, press-effect, glow-accent, smooth-spin
- Utilities: ninja-card (glassmorphic card), gradient-text
- Accessibility: full `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` support

**Task 4 -- Root Layout and Supporting Files:**
- `src/lib/theme-context.tsx` -- ThemeProvider with localStorage persistence, system preference detection, dark class toggling on `<html>`
- `src/lib/utils.ts` -- `cn()` utility function using `clsx`
- `src/app/layout.tsx` -- Root layout with Geist + Geist Mono fonts loaded via `next/font/google`, ThemeProvider wrapper, Sonner toaster with themed styles, French locale (`lang="fr"`)
- `src/app/page.tsx` -- Home page that redirects to `/login`

### Files created (5 files, 304 lines)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `C:\Users\User\RoyallAzz\src\app\globals.css` | Full design system with dual-theme CSS variables |
| `C:\Users\User\RoyallAzz\src\lib\theme-context.tsx` | Theme provider with light/dark toggle |
| `C:\Users\User\RoyallAzz\src\lib\utils.ts` | cn() class name utility |
| `C:\Users\User\RoyallAzz\src\app\layout.tsx` | Root layout with fonts, theme, toaster |
| `C:\Users\User\RoyallAzz\src\app\page.tsx` | Home page redirect to /login |

### Dev server status

- **`pnpm dev`**: Starts successfully -- "Ready in 4s" with zero compilation errors
- **`pnpm run typecheck`**: Passes with zero TypeScript errors

### Commit

```
9ffb2c5 feat: add design system (globals.css) and root layout with fonts and theme
```

### Notes

- The Next.js workspace root warning about multiple lockfiles is cosmetic (a `package-lock.json` exists in `C:\Users\User`). It does not affect functionality. If desired, it can be silenced by adding `outputFileTracingRoot` to `next.config.ts`.
- The `/login` route does not exist yet, so navigating to `localhost:3000` will show a 404 after the redirect -- this is expected and will be resolved when the auth pages are implemented in a later task.
